label: Force-free curl H = alpha H fields admit poloidal and toroidal eigenfunction solutions

provenance.source_span: 1957 Ap J. . .126. .457C ON FORCE-FREE MAGNETIC FIELDS* S. Chandrasekhar University of Chicago

strengths: Supplies force-free eigenfunction foundations for Beltrami-style construction.
weaknesses: Force-free basis results are foundational, not direct stability evidence for Atlas.
